accessibilityRules.name: visibleFocus
accessibilityRules.definition: Interactive controls must define a visible focus state.

accessibilityRules.name: keyboardReachable
accessibilityRules.definition: Interactive controls and overlay controls must be reachable by keyboard.

accessibilityRules.name: semanticLabels
accessibilityRules.definition: Controls, navigation, fields, and regions need meaningful labels.

accessibilityRules.name: inlineFieldErrors
accessibilityRules.definition: Field-specific errors appear at the field and do not rely on toast or color alone.

accessibilityRules.name: overlayFocusManagement
accessibilityRules.definition: Blocking overlays must describe focus entry, containment, dismissal, and return.

accessibilityRules.name: targetSize
accessibilityRules.definition: Touch-oriented controls must preserve usable target size across responsive states.

accessibilityRules.name: contrastCheckRequired
accessibilityRules.definition: Generated or inferred color pairs require contrast validation before production use.

accessibilityRules.name: motionReduced
accessibilityRules.definition: Prototype behavior that implies motion should preserve a reduced-motion path.
